---
title: "Model probabilities"
author: "Adapted by Claire Punturieri for study_gps from JJC"
date: "`r lubridate::today()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true 
    toc_depth: 4
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
params:
  version: "v24"
  cv: "nested_2_x_5_6_x_5"
  model: "full_v_baseline"
  batch: "full"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)

options(conflicts.policy = "depends.ok")
library(probably)

source("https://github.com/jjcurtin/lab_support/blob/main/format_path.R?raw=true")

path_input <- format_path("risk/models/gps")

version <- params$version
cv <- params$cv
model <- params$model
batch <- params$batch
```

```{r}
preds <- read_csv(here::here(path_input, str_c("outer_preds_", 
                                            version, "_", 
                                            cv, "_", batch, ".csv")))

```

Make basic curve.
```{r}
roc_data <- preds |> 
  mutate(label = factor(label, levels = c("lapse", "no lapse"))) |> 
  roc_curve(prob_logi, truth = label)
  
plot_roc <- function(df, line_colors){
  df |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = 1 - specificity, y = sensitivity, color = model)) +
    geom_path(linewidth = 1.25) +
    geom_abline(lty = 3) +
    coord_fixed(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1)) +
    labs(x = "False Positive Rate",
        y = "True Positive Rate") +
  scale_color_manual(values = line_colors)
}

roc_data |>
  mutate(sensitivity = round(sensitivity, 4),
         specificity = round(specificity, 4)) |>
  group_by(sensitivity, specificity) |> 
  summarise(.threshold = mean(.threshold)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = 1 - specificity, y = sensitivity)) +
  #ggplot(aes(x = specificity, y = sensitivity, color = .threshold)) +
  geom_path(linewidth = 1, color = "red") +
  geom_abline(lty = 3) +
  coord_fixed(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(x = "False Positive Rate",
       y = "True Positive Rate") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0,1,.25),
    labels = sprintf("%.2f", seq(0,1,.25))) + # to flip axis
  #scale_color_gradient(low="darkblue", high = "red", name = "Threshold") +
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = rel(1.50)), 
        axis.title = element_text(size = rel(1.75)))
```

Add in curves for every outer fold.
```{r}
roc_folds <- preds |>
  mutate(label = factor(label, levels = c("lapse", "no lapse"))) |> 
  nest(.by = outer_split_num, .key = "preds") |>
  mutate(roc = map(preds, \(preds) roc_curve(preds, prob_logi,
                                             truth = label)))

fig_roc_folds <- roc_data |>   # plot region from full concatenated data
  ggplot(aes(x = 1 - specificity, y = sensitivity)) +
  geom_abline(lty = 3) +
  coord_fixed(xlim = c(0, 1), ylim = c(0, 1)) +
  labs(x = "Specificity",
       y = "Sensitivity") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = seq(0,1,.25),
    labels = sprintf("%.2f", seq(1,0,-.25))) +
  theme(axis.title.x=element_blank(),
        axis.text.x=element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x=element_blank())

for (i in 1:nrow(roc_folds)) {
  fig_roc_folds <- fig_roc_folds +
     geom_path(data = roc_folds$roc[[i]],
               mapping = aes(x = 1 - specificity, y = sensitivity),
               color = "gray")
}

roc_data_smooth <- roc_data |> mutate(sensitivity = round(sensitivity, 4),
                                      specificity = round(specificity, 4)) |>
  group_by(sensitivity, specificity) |>
  summarise(.threshold = mean(.threshold))

#add full concatenated curve
fig_roc_folds +
     geom_path(data = roc_data_smooth,
               mapping = aes(x = 1 - specificity, y = sensitivity, color = "darkred"),
               linewidth = 2) #+
    #scale_color_gradient(low="blue", high="red")
```

Plot histograms of 30 held out auROCs.
```{r}
auroc_summary <- preds |>
  mutate(label = factor(label, levels = c("lapse", "no lapse"))) |>
  group_by(outer_split_num) |>
  roc_auc(truth = label, prob_logi) |>
  ungroup()

auroc_summary |>
  ggplot(aes(x = .estimate)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = .02)
```
